title: Apply sales procedures in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply sales procedures in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop product and sales knowledge

pcs.text: Research and clarify use, features and application of products and services according to workplace procedures1.2 Research customer buying behaviour 1.3 Consult experienced sales staff or product information guides to increase and confirm knowledge of products, services and sales techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and clarify use, features and application of products and services according to workplace procedures1.2 Research customer buying behaviour 1.3 Consult experienced sales staff or product information guides to increase and confirm knowledge of products, services and sales techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and clarify use, features and application of products and services according to workplace procedures1.2 Research customer buying behaviour 1.3 Consult experienced sales staff or product information guides to increase and confirm knowledge of products, services and sales techniques.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop product and sales knowledge

elements.title: Approach customer and address product or service requirements

pcs.text: Approach customer according to workplace standards and customer behaviour2.2 Determine customer buying motives and requirements, and guide customer to suitable product, service or specialist as required2.3 Respond to routine customer questions about features and benefits of product or service, or refer to more experienced sales staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Approach customer according to workplace standards and customer behaviour2.2 Determine customer buying motives and requirements, and guide customer to suitable product, service or specialist as required2.3 Respond to routine customer questions about features and benefits of product or service, or refer to more experienced sales staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Approach customer according to workplace standards and customer behaviour2.2 Determine customer buying motives and requirements, and guide customer to suitable product, service or specialist as required2.3 Respond to routine customer questions about features and benefits of product or service, or refer to more experienced sales staff.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Approach customer and address product or service requirements

elements.title: Identify and resolve objections

pcs.text: Identify and acknowledge customer objections 3.2 Analyse solutions to objections in line with category of objection3.3 Offer solutions to objections within scope of own responsibility and according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and acknowledge customer objections 3.2 Analyse solutions to objections in line with category of objection3.3 Offer solutions to objections within scope of own responsibility and according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and acknowledge customer objections 3.2 Analyse solutions to objections in line with category of objection3.3 Offer solutions to objections within scope of own responsibility and according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify and resolve objections

elements.title: Close sale

pcs.text: Monitor, identify and respond to customer buying signals4.2 Select and apply method of closing sale to encourage customer purchase decision according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor, identify and respond to customer buying signals4.2 Select and apply method of closing sale to encourage customer purchase decision according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor, identify and respond to customer buying signals4.2 Select and apply method of closing sale to encourage customer purchase decision according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Close sale

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
